'''navaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jjigae|jjigae]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-v-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jjigae|jjigae]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| navaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nævæjæth|nævæjæth]] || [[word:nævæjæj|nævæjæj]] || [[word:nævæjæsh|nævæjæsh]] || [[word:nævæjæ|nævæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:navavajath|navavajath]] || [[word:navavajaj|navavajaj]] || [[word:navavajash|navavajash]] || [[word:navavaja|navavaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:navajath|navajath]] || [[word:navajaj|navajaj]] || [[word:navajash|navajash]] || [[word:navaja|navaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:navafjafth|navafjafth]] || [[word:navafjafj|navafjafj]] || [[word:navafjafsh|navafjafsh]] || [[word:navafjaf|navafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:navajatha|navajatha]] || [[word:navajaja|navajaja]] || [[word:navajasha|navajasha]] || [[word:navajaka|navajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:navajath|navajath]] || [[word:navajaj|navajaj]] || [[word:navajash|navajash]] || [[word:navaja|navaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:navajathal|navajathal]] || [[word:navajajal|navajajal]] || [[word:navajashal|navajashal]] || [[word:navajakal|navajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:navajaathatha|navajaathatha]] || [[word:navajaajaja|navajaajaja]] || [[word:navajaashasha|navajaashasha]] || [[word:navajaaka|navajaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:navajathan|navajathan]] || [[word:navajajan|navajajan]] || [[word:navajashan|navajashan]] || [[word:navajakan|navajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:navajathaoro|navajathaoro]] || [[word:navajajaoro|navajajaoro]] || [[word:navajashaoro|navajashaoro]] || [[word:navajakaoro|navajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5551a29}}
